channel.title: F-HDOnline (unavailable)
channel.description: Last generation attempt failed on 2026-04-10 09:36:29 UTC. Reason: HTML scrape failed: All HTML methods failed for f_hdonline: playwright: All HTML candidates failed for f_hdonline via playwright: Failed to fetch 'https://f-hdonline.ro/': HTTPSConnectionPool(host='f-hdonline.ro', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: / (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='f-hdonline.ro', port=443) at 0x7f4dc8579850>, 'Connection to f-hdonline.ro timed out. (connect timeout=20.0)')); http: All HTML candidates failed for f_hdonline via http: Failed to fetch 'https://f-hdonline.ro/': Page.goto: Timeout 20000ms exceeded. Call log: - navigating to "https://f-hdonline.ro/", waiting until "load" ; cloudscraper: All HTML candidates failed for f_hdonline via cloudscraper: Failed to fetch 'https://f-hdonline.ro/': Page.goto: Timeout 20000ms exceeded. Call log: - navigating to "https://f-hdonline.ro/", waiting until "load" ; Native RSS failed: All RSS candidates failed for f_hdonline via playwright: Failed to fetch 'https://f-hdonline.ro/feed/': HTTPSConnectionPool(host='f-hdonline.ro', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /feed/ (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='f-hdonline.ro', port=443) at 0x7f4dc8667a90>, 'Connection to f-hdonline.ro timed out. (connect timeout=20.0)')); WordPress API failed: All WordPress API candidates failed for f_hdonline via playwright: Failed to fetch 'https://f-hdonline.ro/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?per_page=24&_embed=1': HTTPSConnectionPool(host='f-hdonline.ro', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /wp-json/wp/v2/posts?per_page=24&_embed=1 (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='f-hdonline.ro', port=443) at 0x7f4dcba22390>, 'Connection to f-hdonline.ro timed out. (connect timeout=20.0)'))
